title: Pet Book Store Building Set Age 13+, Home Décor Model Building with LED Lighting Kit, Creative Activity, Set for Teen and Adults, Compatible with Lego (640 Pieces)
features: 💡【Enjoyable Assembling】The pet book store building kit consists of 640 bricks, the assembly of lighting kit and the building bricks are carried out simultaneously, which makes a unique gift, creative and mindful project.

💐【Safety Material】This building set made of hight-quanlity Eco-friendly ABS plastic, and the surface of the blocks feels smooth. Precision casting processing molding, give you good overall experience in the process.

🌱【Significant Design】There are many small details for add interest such as the chair, trash bin, business schedule, ladder for reaching book, pet claw shaped signboard, postcard mailbox at the door and more. Rich details encourage children to release imagination and explore more role playing fun.

🎈【Creative Decoration】Making the building kit set as a display for your office, bookself, desk and room. Presenting warm lighting effects and a dreamy fairytale atmosphere at night.It will surprise you and make you feel like you are in a comfortable and happy leisure time.

🎁【Perfect Gift】Flower house model is a great gift for kids and adults. Building block is beneficial to child's health and enhance brain development, stimulates child's imagination. Exquisite packaging that can be sent as a birthday gift or Christmas gift. If there are missing parts, please contact us and they will be resent unconditionally.
description: Product Description When art meets engineering, you will love this pet bookstore building toy at the first sight. This is a very delicate building block Pet Book Store. It contains with 640 Pieces bricks and the lighting design is adopted. When the lights are turned on, the whole Book Store is surrounded by lights, which looks very warm. This is a perfect gift for boys and girls on birthdays, Christmas, holidays, festivals. Open the door Disassemble the bookstore Disassemble props
